title: gorteria beguinotii
intro: Gorteria beguinotii, also known as African wormwood or bitter wormwood, is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Gorteria beguinotii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an anthelmintic agent to expel intestinal worms. In traditional herbal medicine, Gorteria beguinotii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also used in tincture or decoction form.
